overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a bald agent in a dark coat exploring a gloomy gothic cemetery with stone statues and ruins. The character approaches a funeral memorial, descends into an open grave, and continues toward a large mist-shrouded mansion with Victorian architecture.

events.description: character exits stone archway into open cemetery grounds
passing between large stone angel statues on pedestals

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the cemetery entrance, passing stone statues and grave markers along the dirt path

entered.detail: large stone archway framing the cemetery entrance with weathered columns
tall stone angel statue on rectangular pedestal
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the cemetery path
distant crumbling stone walls and structures

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from a stone archway into a gloomy cemetery filled with statues and gravestones. The camera follows steadily as the character walks along a dirt path lined with cypress trees, passing large stone angel statues while distant ruins loom in the background under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: funeral memorial site with portrait display

events.description: approaching funeral memorial with large framed portrait and flower arrangements
stopping to observe memorial as mourners depart the scene

agents.ego_description: approaching the memorial site, stopping to observe the portrait and flower arrangements as mourners walk away

notable_agents.action: mourner in dark formal attire standing by the portrait then walking away from the memorial

entered.detail: large framed portrait of a woman on an easel surrounded by white flowers
large wreaths and bouquets of white flowers flanking the portrait
tall hedge wall forming the cemetery boundary

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a funeral memorial where a large portrait stands on an easel surrounded by white flower arrangements. A mourner in dark clothing stands nearby before walking away. The character stops briefly to observe the memorial before the scene continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grave site with descending stairs

events.description: leaving memorial area and approaching open grave with stone stairs
descending stone stairs into the open grave site

agents.ego_description: walking away from the memorial and descending into an open grave site via stone stairs

entered.detail: rectangular excavated grave with brick lining and dark interior
stone steps leading down into the grave site
large stone cross monument with circular ring

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the memorial and approaches an open grave site. The camera follows as the character descends stone stairs into the excavated grave, revealing brick-lined walls and a dark interior, with a large Celtic cross monument visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: cemetery path with funeral chairs and ruins

events.description: ascending from the grave and continuing along the cemetery path
passing rows of folding chairs set up for the funeral service

agents.ego_description: ascending from the grave and walking through cemetery paths past stone monuments and rows of folding chairs

entered.detail: rows of empty folding chairs arranged for a funeral service
crumbling stone walls and broken structures
large Victorian gothic mansion with multiple spires and towers

segments.scene_description: The character climbs out of the grave and continues along a dirt path through the cemetery, passing rows of empty folding chairs and stone ruins. The gothic mansion becomes more prominent in the distance as the character approaches the stone gates.

events.description: passing through ruined stone gates toward the mansion entrance
turning right to walk along the mansion exterior wall

agents.ego_description: walking through stone gates toward the gothic mansion, then turning to walk along the exterior wall toward the stairs

entered.detail: crumbling stone gateposts framing the mansion entrance
wide stone staircase leading up to the mansion entrance

segments.scene_description: The character passes through ruined stone gates and approaches the imposing gothic mansion, which dominates the frame with its detailed Victorian architecture and spires. The character then turns right to walk along the mansion's exterior wall, passing a wide stone staircase leading to the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gloomy gothic cemetery that gradually leads to the imposing facade of a Victorian mansion. It begins as the character emerges from a stone archway, moving along a dirt path lined with cypress trees and stone angel statues under an overcast sky. As the character approaches a funeral memorial adorned with white flowers and a portrait, the camera lingers briefly before following the descent down stone stairs into a brick-lined open grave. The scene then shifts as the character climbs back out and continues past rows of empty folding chairs and ruins, with the distant mansion becoming increasingly prominent. Finally, the camera passes through ruined stone gates to reveal the full scale of the mansion's spires and architecture before turning right to follow the exterior wall toward a wide stone staircase.
